# MDE v1.5.18

## Features

- Agent Chat now renders assistant replies with GitHub-flavored Markdown through `react-markdown` and `remark-gfm`, preserving headings, lists, code blocks, and tables.
- Codex thinking output now streams into the chat panel during a turn, and thinking restored from history is shown collapsed by default.
- The Agent Chat context preview now lets users choose whether to send the current document and selected text, and selected snippets can be pinned for repeated use.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Codex history switching so resumed native sessions hydrate the full message history instead of showing an empty or mismatched session.
- Fixed multi-window session list loading by falling back to MDE session metadata when native history listing is unavailable.
- Fixed selected-text context loss after focusing the chat composer or chat panel by preserving the last non-empty editor selection for the active document.
- Fixed AI Markdown output being compressed into a single visual line and removed the duplicate right-side border in the chat panel.
- Removed the fixed maximum chat panel width while preserving the draggable split with the editor.
- Fixed unchecked context items so they are excluded from the prompt payload.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added desktop runtime dependencies for Markdown rendering: `react-markdown` and `remark-gfm`.
- Added Agent Chat coverage for Markdown rendering, streaming thinking messages, history hydration, context toggles, pinned selections, panel layout styles, component ids, and session list fallbacks.
- Fixed release CI coverage by running Agent Chat package tests from the root coverage suite.
- Stabilized the Agent Chat shell test under coverage instrumentation.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese AI manual for Agent Chat Markdown rendering, streaming thinking, context toggles, pinned selections, and session behavior.
- Updated the Chinese component-name reference with the new Agent Chat controls.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat test`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:e2e:agent-chat`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --coverage --exclude apps/desktop/tests/unit/agentCliAdapters.test.ts`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow when the Windows release job is enabled.
